reports.title: Iran's 10-Point Plan and the Coerced Ceasefire
reports.subtitle: A hostage exchange disguised as diplomacy — both sides are trading things they can't afford to lose.

reports.title: Sánchez's Bucket and What It Costs to Say No Inside NATO
reports.subtitle: Spain's PM said the obvious thing — you don't get credit for putting out a fire you started. The interesting question is why he's the only one.
